title: Implement secretx-yandex-lockbox backend
description: Implement the Yandex Cloud Lockbox backend. Stub README exists at secretx-yandex-lockbox/README.md. URI: secretx:yandex-lockbox:<secret-id>. Auth via YANDEX_CLOUD_IAM_TOKEN or YANDEX_CLOUD_SA_KEY_FILE (service account JSON, exchange for IAM token). API: payload.lockbox.api.cloud.yandex.net. Lockbox has a key-value payload model; ?field= selects a single entry. Implements SecretStore and WritableSecretStore. ESO provider exists (Kubernetes ecosystem).
